title: Mystery Train
synopsis:
"I think almost everybody in Memphis has picked up Elvis’s ghost hitchhiking."
Over 24 hours in Memphis, three stories unfold simultaneously around a rundown hotel. A Japanese couple makes a rock-and-roll pilgrimage; an Italian widow stranded with her husband’s coffin sees a ghost; and a drunken Englishman hides out with friends after accidentally shooting a clerk. Eschewing conventional narrative, Jarmusch connects these parallel episodes through a midnight radio broadcast and a mysterious gunshot, playfully dissecting American pop culture.

synopsis_lang.en:
"I think almost everybody in Memphis has picked up Elvis’s ghost hitchhiking."
Over 24 hours in Memphis, three stories unfold simultaneously around a rundown hotel. A Japanese couple makes a rock-and-roll pilgrimage; an Italian widow stranded with her husband’s coffin sees a ghost; and a drunken Englishman hides out with friends after accidentally shooting a clerk. Eschewing conventional narrative, Jarmusch connects these parallel episodes through a midnight radio broadcast and a mysterious gunshot, playfully dissecting American pop culture.
synopsis_lang.zh_hk:
「我想在孟菲斯，幾乎每個人都讓貓王的鬼魂搭過順風車。」
在貓王故鄉孟菲斯，三個故事在同一個夜晚於一家破舊旅館交織上演：日本情侶為向搖滾樂朝聖而來 ，卻因音樂品味爭論不休；意大利寡婦在護送丈夫遺體途中滯留，於房間內遇見不可思議的幻象；失戀的英國男子醉酒開槍傷人，與朋友躲進旅館避風頭。三組異鄉人在同一時空下擦身而過。占渣木殊拋開傳統敘事框架，以午夜的電台廣播與神祕槍聲串連起這些平行事件，戲謔地剖開美國流行文化的表象。

cast: Nagase Masatoshi, Kudoh Youki, Nicoletta Braschi, Steve Buscemi

cast_lang.en: Nagase Masatoshi, Kudoh Youki, Nicoletta Braschi, Steve Buscemi
cast_lang.zh_hk: 永瀨正敏、工藤夕貴、Nicoletta Braschi、Steve Buscemi
